Before filing: check [README.md](../../README.md), [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md),
and [docs/](../../docs) (`architecture.md`, `feature-set.md`, `brain-api.md`) — a lot of the
"how do I" answers live there.

For open-ended discussion (not a specific bug/feature), consider using
[GitHub Discussions](../../discussions) instead — issues here are best for
concrete, actionable questions.
